name: Simple Addition
description: Add two numbers and display the sum.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ADD-NUMS.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-A   PIC 9(3) VALUE 150.
       01 WS-B   PIC 9(3) VALUE 250.
       01 WS-SUM PIC 9(4) VALUE 0.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           ADD WS-A TO WS-B GIVING WS-SUM.
           DISPLAY 'SUM = ' WS-SUM.
           STOP RUN.

name: Display Greeting
description: Display a static greeting — minimal logic.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. GREET.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           DISPLAY 'HELLO, WORLD!'.
           STOP RUN.

name: Subtract and Display
description: Subtract two values and display the difference.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SUBTRACT-DEMO.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-X    PIC 9(4) VALUE 1000.
       01 WS-Y    PIC 9(4) VALUE 0350.
       01 WS-DIFF PIC 9(4) VALUE 0.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           SUBTRACT WS-Y FROM WS-X GIVING WS-DIFF.
           DISPLAY 'DIFFERENCE = ' WS-DIFF.
           STOP RUN.

name: Multiply and Compute
description: Multiply two variables using COMPUTE verb.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MULT-DEMO.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-A      PIC 9(3) VALUE 012.
       01 WS-B      PIC 9(3) VALUE 005.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9(5) VALUE 0.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           COMPUTE WS-RESULT = WS-A * WS-B.
           DISPLAY 'PRODUCT = ' WS-RESULT.
           STOP RUN.

name: If-Else Grade Check
description: Classify a score into letter grades using IF/ELSE.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. GRADE-CHECK.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SCORE PIC 9(3) VALUE 085.
       01 WS-GRADE PIC A(1).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           IF WS-SCORE >= 90
               MOVE 'A' TO WS-GRADE
           ELSE IF WS-SCORE >= 80
               MOVE 'B' TO WS-GRADE
           ELSE IF WS-SCORE >= 70
               MOVE 'C' TO WS-GRADE
           ELSE
               MOVE 'F' TO WS-GRADE
           END-IF.
           DISPLAY 'GRADE: ' WS-GRADE.
           STOP RUN.

name: Evaluate Day Type
description: Use EVALUATE (switch-case) to classify weekday vs weekend.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. DAY-TYPE.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-DAY  PIC 9(1) VALUE 3.
       01 WS-TYPE PIC X(10).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           EVALUATE WS-DAY
               WHEN 1 THRU 5
                   MOVE 'WEEKDAY' TO WS-TYPE
               WHEN 6
                   MOVE 'SATURDAY' TO WS-TYPE
               WHEN 7
                   MOVE 'SUNDAY' TO WS-TYPE
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE 'INVALID' TO WS-TYPE
           END-EVALUATE.
           DISPLAY 'DAY TYPE: ' WS-TYPE.
           STOP RUN.

name: Sign Detection
description: Determine if a number is positive, negative, or zero.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SIGN-CHECK.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-NUM  PIC S9(4) VALUE -42.
       01 WS-SIGN PIC X(10).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           IF WS-NUM > 0
               MOVE 'POSITIVE' TO WS-SIGN
           ELSE IF WS-NUM < 0
               MOVE 'NEGATIVE' TO WS-SIGN
           ELSE
               MOVE 'ZERO' TO WS-SIGN
           END-IF.
           DISPLAY 'SIGN: ' WS-SIGN.
           STOP RUN.

name: Perform Loop Sum
description: Sum integers from 1 to 5 using PERFORM VARYING.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. LOOP-DEMO.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-I   PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-SUM PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > 5
               ADD WS-I TO WS-SUM
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL = ' WS-SUM.
           STOP RUN.

name: Factorial Compute
description: Compute factorial of 5 using a PERFORM loop.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FACTORIAL.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-N    PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
       01 WS-I    PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-FACT PIC 9(5) VALUE 1.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > WS-N
               COMPUTE WS-FACT = WS-FACT * WS-I
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'FACTORIAL = ' WS-FACT.
           STOP RUN.

name: Nested IF with Compute
description: Nested conditionals for tax bracket calculation.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TAX-CALC.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INCOME PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 75000.00.
       01 WS-TAX    PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-NET    PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 0.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           IF WS-INCOME > 100000
               COMPUTE WS-TAX = WS-INCOME * 0.30
           ELSE
               IF WS-INCOME > 50000
                   COMPUTE WS-TAX = WS-INCOME * 0.20
               ELSE
                   COMPUTE WS-TAX = WS-INCOME * 0.10
               END-IF
           END-IF.
           COMPUTE WS-NET = WS-INCOME - WS-TAX.
           DISPLAY 'TAX = ' WS-TAX.
           DISPLAY 'NET = ' WS-NET.
           STOP RUN.

name: Payroll with PERFORM and 88-level
description: Multi-paragraph PERFORM with 88-level condition-names — real-world payroll.
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PAYROLL.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SALARY PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 5000.00.
       01 WS-TAX    PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-BONUS  PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-NET    PIC 9(7)V99 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-ACTIVE PIC X VALUE 'Y'.
          88 IS-ACTIVE   VALUE 'Y'.
          88 IS-INACTIVE VALUE 'N'.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF IS-ACTIVE
               PERFORM CALCULATE-TAX
               PERFORM CALCULATE-BONUS
               COMPUTE WS-NET = WS-SALARY - WS-TAX + WS-BONUS
               DISPLAY 'NET PAY: ' WS-NET
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE INACTIVE'
           END-IF.
           STOP RUN.
       CALCULATE-TAX.
           COMPUTE WS-TAX = WS-SALARY * 0.20.
       CALCULATE-BONUS.
           IF WS-SALARY > 3000
               COMPUTE WS-BONUS = WS-SALARY * 0.10
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO WS-BONUS
           END-IF.

name: Accumulator with Nested Loop
description: Nested PERFORM loop computing sum of products (i*j for i,j in 1..3).
input:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. NESTED-LOOP.
       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-I     PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-J     PIC 9(2) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-PROD  PIC 9(4) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TOTAL PIC 9(5) VALUE 0.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARA.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > 3
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 1 BY 1
                   UNTIL WS-J > 3
                   COMPUTE WS-PROD = WS-I * WS-J
                   ADD WS-PROD TO WS-TOTAL
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL = ' WS-TOTAL.
           STOP RUN.
